label: Render node properties
description: Base schema for pawn render node properties. Shared by PawnRenderTreeDef, GeneDef, HediffDef, TraitDef, ApparelProperties, and other pawn-rendering defs.

workerClass.label: Worker class
workerClass.description: C# PawnRenderNodeWorker subclass handling rendering logic for this node.

subworkerClasses.label: Subworker classes
subworkerClasses.description: Additional C# PawnRenderSubWorker types contributing to this node's render.

nodeClass.label: Node class
nodeClass.description: C# PawnRenderNode subclass for this node.

tagDef.label: Tag def
tagDef.description: PawnRenderNodeTagDef identifying this node so child nodes can reference it via parentTagDef.

parentTagDef.label: Parent tag def
parentTagDef.description: PawnRenderNodeTagDef of the parent node this node attaches to in the render tree.

children.label: Children
children.description: Nested render nodes that are children of this node in the render tree.

texPath.label: Texture path
texPath.description: Texture atlas path for this render node.

texPaths.label: Texture paths
texPaths.description: List of texture atlas paths; used when multiple textures are cycled or selected at runtime.

texPathFemale.label: Texture path (female)
texPathFemale.description: Texture atlas path used for female pawns.

texPathsFemale.label: Texture paths (female)
texPathsFemale.description: List of texture atlas paths used for female pawns.

bodyTypeGraphicPaths.label: Body type graphic paths
bodyTypeGraphicPaths.description: Per-BodyTypeDef texture atlas paths. Child element names are BodyTypeDef defNames; text is the texture path.

texSeed.label: Texture seed
texSeed.description: Integer seed used for deterministic texture selection from texPaths.

useGraphic.label: Use graphic
useGraphic.description: If false, this node renders without a graphic (used for positioning-only nodes).

skipFlag.label: Skip flag
skipFlag.description: RenderSkipFlagDef that suppresses rendering of this node when set on the pawn.

rotDrawMode.label: Rotation draw mode
rotDrawMode.description: Comma-separated flags controlling which decay stages render this node. Values: Fresh, Rotting, Dessicated.

pawnType.label: Pawn type
pawnType.description: Restricts this node to humanlike or non-humanlike pawns only.

linkedBodyPartsGroup.label: Linked body parts group
linkedBodyPartsGroup.description: BodyPartGroupDef controlling visibility based on attached body parts.

color.label: Color
color.description: Optional RGBA color override for this node. Format: (r, g, b, a).

colorRGBPostFactor.label: Color RGB post factor
colorRGBPostFactor.description: RGB multiplier applied after base color resolution. Format: (r, g, b, a).

useRottenColor.label: Use rotten color
useRottenColor.description: If true, applies rotten color tint when the pawn is in a rotting decay stage.

useSkinShader.label: Use skin shader
useSkinShader.description: If true, uses the skin shader for this node instead of the default cutout shader.

shaderTypeDef.label: Shader type def
shaderTypeDef.description: ShaderTypeDef overriding the default shader for this node's graphic.

colorType.label: Color type
colorType.description: Source of the color applied to this node (Custom, Hair, or Skin).

baseLayer.label: Base layer
baseLayer.description: Rendering layer depth for this node. Lower values render behind higher values.

drawData.label: Draw data
drawData.description: Per-direction transform data (offset, layer, rotation, flip, scale) for this node.

oppositeFacingLayerWhenFlipped.label: Opposite facing layer when flipped
oppositeFacingLayerWhenFlipped.description: If true, uses the opposite cardinal direction's layer value when this node is horizontally flipped.

overrideMeshSize.label: Override mesh size
overrideMeshSize.description: If true, the node's mesh size is determined by drawSize rather than the graphic's native size.

drawSize.label: Draw size
drawSize.description: 2D draw size in world units. Accepts forms: (x, y), x,y, or a single uniform value.

anchorTag.label: Anchor tag
anchorTag.description: PawnRenderNodeTagDef of the node this node is spatially anchored to.

side.label: Side
side.description: Lateral side this node occupies (Center, Left, or Right).

narrowCrownHorizontalOffset.label: Narrow crown horizontal offset
narrowCrownHorizontalOffset.description: Horizontal offset adjustment applied for narrow-crown head types.

visibleFacing.label: Visible facing
visibleFacing.description: List of Rot4 directions in which this node is visible. Empty means all directions.

flipGraphic.label: Flip graphic
flipGraphic.description: If true, the graphic is horizontally flipped.

rotateIndependently.label: Rotate independently
rotateIndependently.description: If true, this node rotates independently of the pawn's facing direction.

debugLabel.label: Debug label
debugLabel.description: Human-readable label shown in debug rendering overlays.

overlayLayer.label: Overlay layer
overlayLayer.description: Which overlay layer this node occupies when drawn as a pawn overlay (Body or Head).

overlayOverApparel.label: Overlay over apparel
overlayOverApparel.description: If true, this overlay node is drawn on top of apparel.
